---
title: "distance_transform_edt"
generated: true
description: "Exact Euclidean distance transform (scipy `distance_transform_edt`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.morphology`](../nitrix-morphology.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.morphology._mm`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:distance_transform_edt -->
```python
distance_transform_edt(mask: Num[Array, '... *spatial'], *, sampling: Optional[Union[float, Sequence[float]]] = None, backend: Backend = 'auto') -> Float[Array, '... *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:distance_transform_edt -->
Exact Euclidean distance transform (scipy `distance_transform_edt`).

Thin alias for [`distance_transform`](../nitrix-morphology/distance_transform.qmd) with `metric="euclidean"` --
the separable min-plus-matmul engine (semiring Pallas-CUDA kernel + JAX
fallback).  Computes the distance from each non-zero voxel to the nearest
zero voxel.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:distance_transform_edt -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mask` | `Num` | `...` × `*spatial` | — | Input array, `(..., *spatial)`. Zero positions are the boundary; every axis is treated as spatial. |
| `sampling` | `Optional[Union[float, Sequence[float]]]` | — | `None` | Per-axis voxel spacing for anisotropic grids: `None` (unit spacing), a scalar (isotropic), or one value per axis (scipy semantics). |
| `backend` | `Backend` | — | `'auto'` | Execution backend forwarded to the underlying [`semiring_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) (`"auto"`, `"pallas-cuda"`, or `"jax"`). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `*spatial`. Euclidean distance map of the same spatial shape as `mask`; $+\infty$ where `mask` is everywhere non-zero (no boundary reachable).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:distance_transform_edt -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
